narrative:
Fairfield Twp township has 6,782 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
